summary: Frontend testing completed for fiscal year configuration simplification, dark mode, and navigation. All requested features are working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created Exercice 2025 fiscal year during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fiscal year configuration is now simplified. In 'Informations générales' page, there are month/day selectors for fiscal period start. In 'Exercices' page, the creation modal only asks for year and automatically calculates dates based on company settings. Dark mode toggle works correctly with proper bg-slate-900 on main area.

details: Month selector (Mois de début) found with data-testid='fiscal-year-month-select'
Day selector (Jour de début) found with data-testid='fiscal-year-day-select'
Preview shows example: 'Du 1 Janvier 2024 au 31 Décembre 2024'
Info message: 'Les dates sont calculées automatiquement selon la configuration de votre entreprise (1 Janvier)'
Only year selector present (no date inputs)
Preview shows calculated dates: 'Exercice 2025 - Du 1 Janvier 2025 au 31 Décembre 2025'
Successfully created Exercice 2025 with automatic date calculation
Main area background in dark mode: rgb(15, 23, 42) (slate-900)
Sidebar background in dark mode: rgb(30, 41, 59) (slate-800)
All text readable with proper contrast
